title: Tangy Flaky Moroccan Citrus Peel Crumble
description: A tangy and flaky dish featuring mixed peel from oranges and lemons with a touch of Middle Eastern spices, perfect for breakfast or as an accompaniment to the main meal. This dish is also paleo-friendly.

ingredients.name: citrus peel (mixed)
ingredients.notes: ensure you have both orange and lemon peels

ingredients.name: maple syrup
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, it's a sweetener but should be minimal due to the citrus

ingredients.name: paleo-friendly almond flour
ingredients.notes: ensure it is unsweetened and free from added sugars

instructions: Combine the melted coconut oil, maple syrup, almond flour, and extracts in a mixing bowl.
Gently fold in the citrus peel pieces until they are evenly distributed through the mixture.
Press the crumble into a lightly greased dish or mold, making sure it is even all over.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top. Gently press down with a spatula to check if done; do not overbake as you want a crisp texture.
